mapper.select: SELECT p.id AS post_id, p.user_id, u.nickname, u.profile_image_url, p.location_id, l.si_do, l.si_gun_gu, p.content, p.created_at, CASE WHEN pl.user_id IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS likeYN, CASE WHEN p.user_id = #{userId} THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS isMine, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_likes WHERE post_id = p.id) AS likeCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts WHERE parent_id = p.id) AS commentCount, p.status FROM posts p LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = p.user_id LEFT JOIN locations l ON l.id = p.location_id LEFT JOIN post_likes pl ON pl.post_id = p.id AND pl.user_id = #{userId} WHERE p.id = #{postId} AND p.status = 'ACTIVE'

SELECT p.id AS post_id, p.user_id, u.nickname, u.profile_image_url, p.location_id, l.si_do, l.si_gun_gu, p.content, p.created_at, CASE WHEN pl.user_id IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS likeYN, CASE WHEN p.user_id = #{userId} THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS isMine, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_likes WHERE post_id = p.id) AS likeCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts WHERE parent_id = p.id) AS commentCount, p.status FROM posts p LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = p.user_id LEFT JOIN locations l ON l.id = p.location_id LEFT JOIN post_likes pl ON pl.post_id = p.id AND pl.user_id = #{userId} WHERE p.parent_id = #{postId} AND p.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY p.created_at ASC
SELECT user_id FROM posts WHERE id = #{postId}
mapper.update: UPDATE posts SET status = 'DELETED' WHERE id = #{postId}

choose.otherwise: INSERT INTO posts (user_id, location_id, content, depth) VALUES (#{userId}, #{locationId}, #{content}, 0)

mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM post_likes WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM post_likes WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND user_id = #{userId}
